channel.title: Insights — Dr. Aidan Kaye · The Compound Method
channel.description: Clinical perspectives on movement, performance, and the mechanics of a body built to last.

item.title: 5 Squash Warm-Up Mistakes That Cause Injury
item.description: Most squash injuries don't happen during a match — they happen during warm-up. Here are the five most common pre-match mistakes and what to do instead.
item.author: Dr. Aidan Kaye
